contentBlocks.original:
कायेन वाचा मनसेन्द्रियैर्वा
बुद्ध्यात्मना वा प्रकृतेः स्वभावात्
करोमि यद्यत् सकलं परस्मै
नारायणायेति समर्पयामि
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kāyena vācā manasendriyairvā
buddhyātmanā vā prakṛteḥ svabhāvāt
karomi yadyat sakalaṃ parasmai
nārāyaṇāyeti samarpayāmi
contentBlocks.translation: Whatever actions I perform with my body, speech, mind, or senses, with my intellect, self, or by my inherent nature—whatever they may be, I offer them all to the Supreme Nārāyaṇa.
contentBlocks.meanings: कायेन (kāyena) – with the body; वाचा (vācā) – with speech; मनसा (manasā) – with the mind; इन्द्रियैः (indriyaiḥ) – with the senses; वा (vā) – or; बुद्ध्या (buddhyā) – with intellect; आत्मना (ātmanā) – with the self; वा (vā) – or; प्रकृतेः (prakṛteḥ) – of nature; स्वभावात् (svabhāvāt) – by inherent nature; करोमि (karomi) – I perform; यत् (yat) – whatever; यत् (yat) – whatever; सकलं (sakalaṃ) – all; परस्मै (parasmai) – to the Supreme; नारायणाय (nārāyaṇāya) – to Nārāyaṇa; इति (iti) – thus; समर्पयामि (samarpayāmi) – I offer;
